# GowriAI.Ventures

GowriAI.Ventures builds and backs practical AI products across security, quantitative reasoning, valuation, and applied enterprise workflows.

## Site
- Homepage: https://gowriai.ventures/
- Contact: mailto:hello@gowriai.ventures

## Initiatives
- AgentFuzz: https://agentfuzz.ai
  AI-assisted security testing and agent-driven fuzzing workflows.
- ThreatValut.ai: https://cestatech.com/
  Joint effort with Cesta focused on AI-supported threat valuation and security decision support.
- Mathz.app: https://mathz.app
  AI-assisted mathematical reasoning in an accessible product experience.
- Parametri: https://parametri.ai/
  Applied AI initiative centered on structured workflows and decision-oriented experiences.

## Capabilities
- AI product design and rapid prototyping
- Evaluation-driven systems
- Domain-specific copilots and agentic workflows
- Applied security experimentation
- User-facing tools for enterprise and consumer use cases
